title: Diffractive and photon-induced processes at the LHC: from the odderon discovery, the evidence for saturation to the search for axion-like particles
comment: Proceedings of the 66. Cracow School of Theoretical Physics, June 14-19 2026, Cracow, Poland
summary: We discuss first the discovery of the odderon by the TOTEM and D0 collaborations. We then describe the gap between jets measurements sensitive to the high gluon density regime and the possible observation of saturation phenomenon in Pb Pb interactions. We also mention the sensitivity to beyond standard model physics and to the production of axion-like particles via photon photon interactions.
